title: Confusing ADD error message
body:
Steps:

``` container
$ cat Containerfile 
FROM alpine:latest

WORKDIR "/opt"
ADD "http://lmtx.pragma-ade.nl/install-lmtx/context-linuxmusl.zip"

ENTRYPOINT ["/bin/sh"]
```

**Expected**
The container downloads context-linuxmusl.zip into /opt.

**Actual**
> Error: error building at STEP "ADD "http://lmtx.pragma-ade.nl/install-lmtx/context-linuxmusl.zip"": ADD requires at least one argument

**Work around**
Specify a _second_ argument:

``` container
ADD "http://lmtx.pragma-ade.nl/install-lmtx/context-linuxmusl.zip" "context.zip"
```

**Additional details**
The error message is confusing because `ADD` was given one argument, failed, then indicated that it needs at least one argument.

comments.body: @DaveJarvis I think this is expected to fail because `ADD` expects two arguments `ADD <source> <destination>` please use `ADD "http://lmtx.pragma-ade.nl/install-lmtx/context-linuxmusl.zip" .` to make it work the way you want the result.  I'm closing this issue but feel free to comment below.

> ADD expects two arguments

Sure. Then the error message is incorrect:

> ADD requires at least one argument

Please re-open as a bug so that the error message will be fixed (eventually).
@DaveJarvis Thanks PR https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/236 should close this and will be fixed in `podman/buildah` in the next vendor. cc @nalind

> return fmt.Errorf("%s requires at least two argument", command)

Should be:

> return fmt.Errorf("%s requires at least two arguments", command)

> > return fmt.Errorf("%s requires at least two argument", command)
> 
> Should be:
> 
> > return fmt.Errorf("%s requires at least two arguments", command)

Thanks fixed.
@DaveJarvis Will be automatically closed by the merge bot when PR is merged so reopening.
